title: 2026 Tony Awards Red Carpet: Billy Crystal, Queen Latifah, Cole Escola, More Stars
summary: Julia Louis-Dreyfus, host Pink, Andrew Lloyd Webber, Neil Patrick Harris, Aubrey Plaza and John Lithgow were among those arriving for Broadway's biggest night at Radio City Music Hall.

title: 2026 Tony Awards: Winners List (Updating Live)
summary: 'The Lost Boys' and 'Schmigadoon!' go into the night tied with the most nominations this year at 12 each.
